title: Bear Chase Jump
description: Bear Chase is a great reaction game in which all you need to do is collect the presents. But there’s something wrong here! Your previous selves are appearing as shadows and chasing you down. You’ll have to run and jump across the platforms to avoid them. Since they mimic your own actions, you'll need to calculate the best way to stay out of their reach. Touching a shadow is an instant "game over". Will you be able to stop yourself from… stopping yourself?
